zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotland於1325年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯盧維時，她的父親Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox29歲，母親Annabella Graham of Kincardine26歲。她於1348年2月20日與Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk在英國蘇格蘭培爾盧維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年1月31日在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉阿維尼享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotland于1325年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯盧維时，她的父亲Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox29岁，母亲Annabella Graham of Kincardine26岁。她于1348年2月20日与Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk在英国苏格兰培爾盧維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年1月31日在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉阿維尼享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotland was born in 1325, in Ruthven, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox, was 29 and her mother, Annabella Graham of Kincardine, was 26. She married Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk on 20 February 1348, in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 31 January 1375, in Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotland est née en 1325, à Ruthven, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Annabella Graham of Kincardine, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk le 20 février 1348, à Ruthven, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1375, à Avignon, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotlandが1325年にイギリススコットランドアンガスルスベンで生まれた時，父Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennoxは29歳，母Annabella Graham of Kincardineは26歳であった。1348年2月20日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベンでSir John Erskine Logie of that Ilkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年1月31日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラアヴィグノンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotland(이)가 1325년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 루스븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Graham of Kincardine(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1348년 2월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐에서 Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 1월 31일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 아비뇰에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk em 20 de fevereiro de 1348, em Ruthven, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Drummond Queen Consort of Scotland родилась в 1325 г. в местности рутвен, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Graham of Kincardine, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Erskine Logie of that Ilk 20 февраля 1348 г. в местности рутвен, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 января 1375 г. в местности авигнон, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.
